testCases.name: validateGPU
testCases.description: Validate GPU allocation, run GPU manager and dummy app
testCases.comment1: For Intel GPU use allocationDeviceName gpu.intel.com/xe
testCases.comment2: For gpumgrcmdresMustExist==true, the gpumgrcmdres must give  output starting with 0,
testCases.comment3: appcmdres is sample output of dummy application command
